message:
fix(tests): increase timeouts on slow userEvent-based component tests

Add { timeout: 15_000 } to interactive test cases in PhaseTimeline,
SessionDashboard, ConfidenceChart, EvidenceTimeline, LiteratureSearch,
errorRecovery, critique-storage, test-storage, and readingStore tests.
These tests use userEvent.setup() and async rendering which can exceed
the default 5s timeout under load on the VPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
